title: 渠道结构分析
description: 分析各销售渠道的提货量分布与结构变化趋势

kpis.label: 渠道数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 本月有提货记录的渠道数量

kpis.label: 流通渠道占比
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn LIKE '%流通%' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),0),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 流通渠道提货量占总量比例

kpis.label: 最大渠道
kpis.sql: SELECT deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn ORDER BY SUM(deliv_qty_mt) DESC LIMIT 1
kpis.help: 本月提货量最大的渠道

kpis.label: TOP3渠道集中度
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(qty)*100.0/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(deliv_qty_mt) FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL),0),1) as v FROM (SELECT SUM(deliv_qty_mt) as qty FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 3)
kpis.help: 提货量前3渠道占总量的比例

stages.title: 渠道占比
stages.description: 各渠道的提货量与占比分布
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn as 渠道, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨, ROUND(100.0*SUM(deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(deliv_qty_mt) FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL),0),1) as 占比_pct FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn ORDER BY 提货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪个渠道占比最高？渠道结构是否过于集中？

stages.title: 渠道×产线交叉
stages.description: 各渠道在不同产线上的提货量分布
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn as 渠道, deliv_prodctnline_descrptn as 产线, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨 FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn, deliv_prodctnline_descrptn ORDER BY 渠道, 提货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 不同渠道的产品偏好是什么？哪些产线高度依赖单一渠道？

stages.title: 渠道趋势
stages.description: 近3个月各渠道提货量变化趋势
stages.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) as 月份, deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn as 渠道, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨 FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) IN ('202601','202602','202603') AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY 月份, 渠道 ORDER BY 月份, 提货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 各渠道提货量是上升还是下降？是否有渠道出现异常波动？

summary_prompt: 根据以上渠道结构分析数据（渠道占比、渠道×产线交叉、渠道趋势），请以营销管理视角总结：1)渠道结构特点，2)结构性风险，3)建议的渠道优化方向。不超过150字。
